languages.text: "Немедленно передам ваше распоряжение, Ваша Светлость — и начну выписывать нужные ресурсы для этого плана".
"I will relay your order immediately, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — and I will begin allocating the necessary resources for this plan."
languages.original_text: "Немедленно передам ваше распоряжение, Ваша Светлость — и начну выписывать нужные ресурсы для этого плана".

traits.locale_text: "I will relay your order immediately, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — and I will begin allocating the necessary resources for this plan."
"I will relay your order immediately, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — and I will begin allocating the necessary resources for this plan."
"I will relay your order immediately, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — and I will begin allocating the necessary resources for this plan."

languages.text: 「お申し出はすぐに伝えます。そして、この計画に必要な資源の配分を始めます」
languages.original_text: "I will relay your order immediately, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — and I will begin allocating the necessary resources for this plan."

traits.locale_text: 「お申し出はすぐに伝えます。そして、この計画に必要な資源の配分を始めます。」

languages.text: «Transmitiré su orden de inmediato, mi{mf|lord|lady}, y asignaré los recursos necesarios para el plan».
languages.original_text: "I will relay your order immediately, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — and I will begin allocating the necessary resources for this plan."

traits.locale_text: «Transmitiré su orden de inmediato, mi{mf|lord|lady}, y asignaré los recursos necesarios para el plan».

languages.text: “我马上传达您的命令，并着手调配计划所需的资源，大人。”
languages.original_text: "I will relay your order immediately, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — and I will begin allocating the necessary resources for this plan."

traits.locale_text: “我马上传达您的命令，并着手调配计划所需的资源，大人。”

languages.text: "Ich werde Eure Befehle umgehend weiterleiten, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... und die nötigen Ressourcen für diesen Plan bereitstellen."
languages.original_text: "I will relay your order immediately, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — and I will begin allocating the necessary resources for this plan."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Eure Befehle umgehend weiterleiten, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... und die nötigen Ressourcen für diesen Plan bereitstellen.

languages.text: "Emrinizi derhâl ileteceğim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Ayrıca bu plan için gerekli kaynakları tahsis etmeye başlayacağım."
languages.original_text: "I will relay your order immediately, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — and I will begin allocating the necessary resources for this plan."

traits.locale_text: "Emrinizi derhâl ileteceğim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Ayrıca bu plan için gerekli kaynakları tahsis etmeye başlayacağım."

languages.text: « Je transmets votre ordre sur-le-champ, Votre Seigneurie. Je m'attellerai ensuite à allouer les ressources nécessaires au bon déroulement du plan. »
languages.original_text: "I will relay your order immediately, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — and I will begin allocating the necessary resources for this plan."

traits.locale_text: « Je transmets votre ordre sur-le-champ, Votre Seigneurie. Je m'attellerai ensuite à allouer les ressources nécessaires au bon déroulement du plan. »
